name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies Lowfat
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Light or Dark Karo Syrup (or corn syrup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Spray cookie sheets with cooking spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
4. Stir in the egg whites, sugar, and vanilla extract until well mixed.
5. Gradually add the oil syrup and mix until smooth.
6. Fold in the raisins (batter will be stiff).
7. Drop rounded teaspoons of batter onto prepared cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 10 minutes or until firm. Do not overbake.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
This recipe makes approximately 2 1/2 dozen cookies. Each cookie contains: 0 grams fat, no cholesterol, 60 calories, 1 gram protein, 65 milligrams sodium, and 13 grams carbohydrates.
